title: Robot Control Protocol v1
description: SDK-independent Redis contract between platform and robot adapters. Keys are namespaced per robot serial: robot:{SN}:*

command.title: command
command.description: Payload of RPUSH robot:{SN}:commands, consumed via BLPOP (FIFO).

id.description: Command id for ack correlation, e.g. {mission_id}:{step}

target.description: Control target, robot-defined (e.g. chassis, actuator, led, flow)

action.description: Action verb, robot-defined (e.g. MOVE, ROTATE, STOP)

command_result.title: command_result
command_result.description: Payload of RPUSH robot:{SN}:cmd_result (capped via LTRIM).

status_hash.title: status_hash
status_hash.description: HASH robot:{SN}:status. Each field value is a JSON string. Core fields are named; all other fields are free-form extensions passed through unchanged.

additionalProperties.description: Extension telemetry field, robot-defined (e.g. position, speed, imu, esc_rpm, armor).

online_key.title: online_key
online_key.description: STRING robot:{SN}:online set to "1" with EX <offline_timeout>. Presence = online.
